CustomField.label: Hard Gate
CustomField.description: When true, this visit blocks stage advancement on the related IndividualApplication. The NEPA_Stage_Gate flow checks for any open visit with nepa_hard_gate__c = true before allowing process stage transition. Set to true by NEPA_Plaintiff_Intelligence for tribal consultation visits and by NEPA_CE_Screener for extraordinary-circumstances visits.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This visit is a hard gate. The process cannot advance to the next stage until this visit is completed.
